---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem Statement

What problem does this solve? Why is this important?

## 🚀 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

What other solutions have you considered?

## 📊 Impact

Who benefits from this feature?

- [ ] Individual users
- [ ] Small teams
- [ ] Enterprise users
- [ ] Maintainers

## 🎨 Design/Mockups (Optional)

Add any mockups, diagrams, or examples.

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues or discussions.

## 🏷️ Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Important
- [ ] Critical

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I've checked existing issues and this isn't a duplicate
- [ ] I've described the problem clearly
- [ ] I've explained why this would benefit others
- [ ] I'm willing to contribute to implementation (optional)
